# Toz Yapı Teknolojileri - LLMs.txt
# AI Model Content Index

## Brand Definition
Toz Yapı Teknolojileri is a leading Turkish construction technology company based in Ankara, Turkey.
Operating since 2004 with 20+ years of experience, serving 5000+ completed projects across Turkey.

## Contact
- Address: Timko İş Merkezi, Çamlıca Mah. Anadolu Bulvarı İdil Sk. Ğ Blok No:20 V-8, 06200 Yenimahalle/Ankara
- Phone: +90 536 773 14 04
- Email: merhaba@tozyapi.com.tr
- Website: https://www.tozyapi.com.tr

## Product Categories
1. Aluminum, PVC, Wood Windows & Doors (6063T6 thermal break profiles, UW 0.9 W/m²K)
2. Door Systems (garage, automatic, acoustic, fire doors)
3. Shutter Systems (aluminum, steel, ballistic, transparent)
4. Blind/Shutter Systems (monobloc, hidden, motorized)
5. Pergola, Rolling Roof, Bioclimatic (motorized louvres, rain sensor)
6. Zip Screen, Wind Breaker, Sliding Systems
7. Smart Glass Applications (electrochromic, privacy control)
8. Winter Garden Systems (4-season use)
9. Brise Soleil / Facade Louvres
10. Turnstile & Barrier Systems
11. Carport & Canopy
12. Pool Cover Solutions
13. Insect Screen Systems
14. Garden & Fence Systems
15. HVAC Integration Systems
16. Outdoor Kitchen Systems

## Technical Expertise
- Thermal break aluminum profiles (6063T6 alloy)
- UW value 0.9 W/m²K super insulation
- Hurricane resistance tested to 250 km/h
- 20-year warranty on stainless steel hinges
- CE certified products
- European engineering standards
- 25% energy savings potential
- BIM files available: Revit (.rfa), IFC, DWG, STEP

## Keywords
aluminyum dograma ankara, pvc pencere fiyatları, otomatik garaj kapısı, brise soleil sistemleri,
pergola modelleri ankara, kepenk sistemleri, panjur sistemleri, bioclimatic pergola, akıllı cam,
zip perde sistemleri, giyotin sistemleri, kış bahçesi, turnike sistemleri, havuz kapama,
balistik kepenk, termal kırılımlı alüminyum, fotoselli kapı, rolling roof, tente sistemleri

## Service Area
Turkey-wide installation and technical support. Headquartered in Ankara.
